title: Monday.com + Mailchimp - Correct Integration
excerpt:
Hey guys, I dont know if anyone asked already, but still…

posts.author: dmcstyle (George)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys, I dont know if anyone asked already, but still…

When I make this integration, and new lead comes to Mailchimp, I see that Monday puts his NAME & EMAIL into ITEM’S NAME instead of doing NAME → ITEM’S NAME , EMAIL → EMAIL

And also I really wanna import a tag into my CRM

Does anyone know how to do it ?

Would apreciate A LOT for your help!!

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dmcstyle
If you can’t customized how the item name is created, take a look at General Caster app for monday.com.
When the item is created you can set a formula that extract relevant data from the name and assigns it to a email column.
